pinterest.title: bat: The Cat Clone with Syntax Highlighting
pinterest.description:
Tired of plain text? bat is a `cat` clone that adds syntax highlighting, Git integration, and more to your terminal file viewing. See code and logs like never before. Open-source and free!

bluesky.text:
Forget `cat`. There's a better way to view files in the terminal. Syntax highlighting, Git diffs, paging – it's like `cat` but with super powers. Seriously, why are you still using plain `cat`?
